**Extracting strike data**

I'm working on outputting JSON in the specified strike extraction format. I need to determine if this document is announcing an upcoming strike — and it definitely seems like it is! The content hints at a 24-hour strike on December 12, 2025. So, I’ll set isStrike to true. I’ll then extract the strike data, ensuring all dates are formatted correctly, and include details like start and end dates, location types, location codes, and guaranteed times.
